inspiratie.muziekTitle: Party music inspiration (for wedding, birthday, school party and more)
inspiratie.muziekIntro1: The right music at the right moment makes the difference between a pleasant evening and an unforgettable party. Whether you're looking for a wedding DJ in Zwijndrecht, a birthday DJ in Dordrecht, or a school party DJ – this guide helps you with concrete songs and tips per moment.
inspiratie.muziekIntro2: In this article you'll find curated playlists per type of party and per phase of the evening: arrival, party start, peak moment and closers. Plus tips to keep the dance floor full and an FAQ with frequently asked questions. Use the playlist generator for a quick custom suggestion.
inspiratie.muziekCtaTop: Looking for a DJ for your party? View DJ hire or get in touch.
inspiratie.bruiloftIntro: At a wedding you want a clear structure: calm arrival for the reception, atmospheric background during dinner, and a party section that gradually builds to the peak moment. Below per phase.
inspiratie.inloopText: Guests arrive, have a drink and catch up. The music should be accessible, not too loud, and create a warm atmosphere. Think singalongs and calm pop.
inspiratie.feeststartText: The first dance is often the wedding song. After that: build energy with songs everyone knows that fill the dance floor.
inspiratie.piekmomentText: Here come the big hits: mix of decades, recognisable songs that fill the floor. Pay attention to the audience – age and preferences determine the mix.
inspiratie.afsluitersText: Gradually let the energy drop. Calm songs that give a nice ending.
inspiratie.verjaardagIntro: Birthdays differ by age. A birthday DJ adapts the repertoire to the birthday person and audience. Here per type.
inspiratie.jaar18Text: Mix of current hits, dance and some 00s nostalgia. Audience wants to party.
inspiratie.jaar20Text: Similar to 18, with more 00s and early 10s.
inspiratie.jaar30Text: 90s and 00s nostalgia, plus current hits. Mixed audience.
inspiratie.jaar40Text: 80s and 90s dominate. Recognisable hits from their youth.
inspiratie.jaar50Text: 70s and 80s, disco and rock. Classics everyone knows.
inspiratie.sweet16Text: Current pop, TikTok hits and singalongs. Young audience.
inspiratie.schoolfeestIntro: A school party DJ works with a young audience. Current hits, dance, and some 00s for variety. Note: no explicit lyrics, suitable for all ages.
inspiratie.party90sIntro: These songs work at almost every party. Recognisable, danceable, and suitable for a corporate event or birthday in Barendrecht and surroundings.
inspiratie.nlFeestIntro: Dutch songs often played at parties. Work well with a mixed audience that likes NL music.
inspiratie.guiltyIntro: Songs people secretly enjoy. Perfect to fill the dance floor when the mood calls for it.
inspiratie.djTipsTitle: 7. DJ tips: how to keep the dance floor full
inspiratie.djTipsIntro: A good DJ builds the evening. Whether you're celebrating in Barendrecht or elsewhere, these principles apply everywhere.
inspiratie.opbouwText: Start calmly, build tempo and energy gradually. After the peak moment you can ease off a bit. No sudden jumps – that loses the dance floor. A sudden transition from calm jazz to hard house rarely works. Build in steps of ten to fifteen BPM.
inspiratie.tempoText: Vary BPM per moment. Arrival: 90–110 BPM. Party: 115–130 BPM. Peak: 125–135 BPM. Closers: calmer again. Within a set you can also vary: three fast songs, then a slightly calmer one to let people catch their breath.
inspiratie.verzoekjesText: Song requests can make or break the mood. A good DJ weighs up: does it fit the moment and the audience? Sometimes "later" is better than playing immediately. If someone asks for a calm song while the floor is full, save it for a calmer moment.
inspiratie.leesZaalText: Is the floor full? Then you can experiment with less known tracks. Are people talking? Then a recognisable hit to draw them in. Watch body language: are they swaying along, or standing still? Adapt to that.
inspiratie.muziekCtaBottom: Ready to book? View DJ hire or get in touch. I'm happy to help with the music for your party.
inspiratie.faq1Q: How many songs should I give my DJ?
inspiratie.faq1A: Give 10–15 must-plays and a short do-not-play list. More becomes unwieldy; a DJ needs to be able to respond flexibly to the dance floor.
inspiratie.faq2Q: What music works best at a wedding?
inspiratie.faq2A: Recognisable hits that appeal to multiple generations. Mix of pop, disco, rock and some dance. The first dance is personal; the rest is broad repertoire.
inspiratie.faq3Q: How do I build a good party playlist?
inspiratie.faq3A: Start calmly (arrival), build up to the party section, and end with closers. Vary tempo and genre; no sudden jumps.
inspiratie.faq4Q: Which songs are suitable for a school party?
inspiratie.faq4A: Current hits, dance, and some 00s. Make sure lyrics are suitable for all ages. No explicit content.
inspiratie.faq5Q: What's the difference between arrival and party music?
inspiratie.faq5A: Arrival: calm, accessible, background. Party: higher tempo, more energy, meant for dancing.
inspiratie.faq6Q: Which Dutch songs work at a party?
inspiratie.faq6A: Zoutelande, Zonder jou, Dansen op de vulkaan, 15 miljoen mensen, and classics by Marco Borsato and BLØF. Depending on the audience.
inspiratie.faq7Q: How do I choose between calm and party for a wedding?
inspiratie.faq7A: Plan per moment: arrival and dinner calm, build up after the first dance. Discuss the programme of the evening with your DJ.
inspiratie.faq8A: 70s and 80s: disco, rock, pop. Stayin' Alive, I Will Survive, Bohemian Rhapsody, Sweet Child O' Mine. Recognisable hits from the birthday person's youth.
inspiratie.faq9Q: Can I ask a DJ to play a specific playlist?
inspiratie.faq9A: Yes. Pass on must-plays and do-not-plays. A good DJ uses your input as a guideline and adapts to the dance floor.
inspiratie.faq10Q: Which guilty pleasures work at a party?
inspiratie.faq10A: Macarena, Barbie Girl, YMCA, Rasputin, Gangnam Style. Use them sparingly – the moment has to be right.
inspiratie.playlistSubtitle: Choose your event, vibe and audience – generate a custom playlist.
inspiratie.playlistCtaTitle: Looking for a DJ for your party?
inspiratie.djSetupLead: Professional equipment for every type of party. From wedding in a luxury venue to corporate event or birthday – the set adapts to the location and atmosphere.
inspiratie.djSetupEquipmentText: The set consists of a Pioneer XDJ-RX3, professional speaker set, DJ booth, dance floor lighting and microphone. Suitable for parties up to approximately 100 people. For larger events we can arrange extra sound and lighting.
inspiratie.djSetupEquipmentNote: Fog machine and lasers depend on the venue. Some halls don't allow fog machines due to smoke alarms. At weddings I coordinate lighting with the photographer – lasers are often discouraged due to risk of lens damage.
inspiratie.fotosLead: A selection of atmosphere photos from parties and events where I've DJ'd. From weddings and birthdays to corporate events – see what your party could look like.
inspiratie.fotosVideosLink: Also view the atmosphere videos on the homepage
inspiratie.fotosCtaTitle: Curious what your party could look like?
inspiratie.fotosCtaText: Get in touch for a non-binding conversation or request a quote directly.
